reviews.review_description: Needs motion controller support badly for selecting things. Keep getting stuck on weather warning window

I really love this app. First, it's beautiful. I think the atmosphere and weather effects are amazing. Also, it's a fun way to explore the weather and the upcoming forecast. I'm also kind of obsessed with searching weather in other locations. It's a great learning tool and just plain fun. I would highly recommend checking out this app =)

The 3d moon and sun icons are so cute! I loved it all. If I could find one thing missing, is the menu environment be more dynamic. If you're looking at a snow forecast, I want to feel like I'm in snow fall more. Or in the rain. Or if it's windy have cows being blown around à la Twister. "Cows! We have cows".  I'm a weather nut, and you have made my day! Thanks guys!
The sun icon comes up, it starts to load, then closes unexpectedly every time. I'm using a galaxy s6

developer_response.body:
Hello cczarnomki,

*Update: We've released a fix to your issue in version 1.0.32, please update

Thank you for reporting this issue, we've identified the bug and will release an update soon this week to resolve.

We appreciate your time.

reviews.review_title: You can see weather info in VR.
reviews.review_description: That's it. There are some videos. Don't click ever. The poor quality and stop. You can see any more. You have stress to see.
As with previous users, I've been unable to get this to start. It initially loads then immediately crashes. S7 Edge

developer_response.body:
Hello CupcakeSlob,

*Update: We've released a fix to your issue in version 1.0.32, please update

Thank you for reporting this issue and the details you've provided, we've identified the bug and will release an update soon this week to resolve.

We appreciate your time.

reviews.review_title: It's a weather app. In VR.
reviews.review_description: I'm not going to day it's the greatest thing ever, but I like that I have the option. It does what it's meant to do. What more could you ask?

reviews.review_title: Sun icon appears, but app doesn't load
reviews.review_description: I'm using a Galaxy S7, and I haven't been able to make the app work
